ref: Abraham put the wood on Isaac's shoulder, but he carried the hot coals and the knife. As the two of them walked along,
text: Ka Abraham n…Ēk daad lin…õ na maal maan la ziil o biig Isaak ka o m…õŇč m…Ēr s č' čg n…õ bugum, ka babayi' la d…Ēl taaba ken.
translated: And Abraham took the wood for the offering and placed it on his son Isaac, and he took the fire and the knife, and the two of them walked together.
